texto: I am grateful for the magic, mystery and majesty of nature – my loyal friend and companion – always there, welcoming and waiting for me to come; to be healed.
explicacao: Citação de Tom North sobre temas ligados a amizade. “I am grateful for the magic, mystery and majesty of nature – my loyal friend and companion – alwa…” articula amizade, healing, magic em registro de amizade, com relevância para contextos como termino e magic.

frase_original: I am grateful for the magic, mystery and majesty of nature – my loyal friend and companion – always there, welcoming and waiting for me to come; to be healed.

texto: Being in the depths of the ocean was like being in the womb, suspended in a liquid environment, listening to my own breathing and heartbeat. Whether it was the serenity and security of being surrounded by this living liquid, or the total distraction of the adventure of the unknown which took me far away from the daily weight of the child abuse and violence at home, I sank beneath the surface, and if only for those few moments, was free.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Tom North: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. O trecho “Being in the depths of the ocean was like being in the womb, suspended in a liquid environment, l…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, free, healing pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e healing.

frase_original: Being in the depths of the ocean was like being in the womb, suspended in a liquid environment, listening to my own breathing and heartbeat. Whether it was the serenity and security of being surrounded by this living liquid, or the total distraction of the adventure of the unknown which took me far away from the daily weight of the child abuse and violence at home, I sank beneath the surface, and if only for those few moments, was free.
